data.body: GATE-CHURN FINDING + fix: claim of 6fe2 failed as 'materially edited' though I only commented. Root cause: rebar.toml enables the opportunistic enrichment drain (REBAR_LLM_OVERLAP_DRAIN=async); after review-plan signs, an ENQUEUE_ENRICH fires and a later write triggers a DRAIN that rewrites the ticket's FILE_IMPACT (part of the plan-review material fingerprint), staling the fresh attestation. Confirmed via 6fe2 event log: SIGNATURE@227 -> ENQUEUE_ENRICH@229 -> FILE_IMPACT@260 (recorded fp 547476e2 vs current aa4716a3). FIX: run all rebar writes with REBAR_LLM_OVERLAP_DRAIN=off so file_impact is stable; re-run review-plan and claim with drain off and no interleaving writes. Applying to all 3 stories. (material fp = sha256 of description+file_impact+children; comments/tags/links are NOT material.)
